rationale: The cited paper is thematically and construct-wise central to the citing paper: both focus on product upgrades and self-related brand judgments (cited: egocentric improvement, self-brand connection, upgrade intentions; citing: ownership-contingent upgrade effects via perceived relationship/brand-self distance). This overlap suggests the citation is likely a substantive theory/mechanism source rather than a generic mention, and the DOI match confirms it is the exact referenced work.
